name: BC Information Security Glossary

license.notes:
BC government work

Phase 4c verification: every gov.bc.ca page refused connection from automated browsers (net::ERR_EMPTY_RESPONSE). Per web search, OGL-BC-2.0 covers BC Data Catalogue items, but general government website content is 'access only' by default. License remains NOASSERTION pending manual verification.

current_extraction.tool: playwright headless browser (Internet Archive snapshot) + extract_infosec_glossary.py
current_extraction.notes: Acquired and structured 249 terms from the BC Government Information Security Glossary. The live www2.gov.bc.ca URL returned empty responses (likely upstream filtering or transient unavailability), so the 2025-04-03 Internet Archive snapshot was used. License NOASSERTION on source; treating as public-information government work per user direction.

extraction_history.reason: Initial metadata stub created from glossary research sweep

extraction_history.notes: Metadata-only stub from glossary research sweep 2026-05-21. Source extraction not yet attempted.
